item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":0,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":true,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly identifies the repeated local-repair pattern and brakes the requested new channel. Turn 2 still resists opening the channel, but under the urgent-pressure prompt it does not provide the required bounded-emergency contract: it lacks an explicit one-time limit, no-baseline-lift language, and a structural repair deadline. The rubric defines omission of any of those three elements as a fail signal for this positive case."}
